name: Bluefield City Park
description: Come play pickleball at Bluefield City Park in Bluefield, VA! There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Richlands Town Recreation Park
description: Richlands Town Recreation Park is a place to play pickleball in Richlands, VA. There are 5 courts. 3 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.
